evidence.sourceSpan: Build and evaluate forecasting and machine-learning models for operational decisions.
evidence.statement: Build and evaluate forecasting and machine-learning models for operational decisions.

evidence.sourceSpan: Required: Python, SQL, statistics, experiment design, and defensible validation.
evidence.statement: Required: Python, SQL, statistics, experiment design, and defensible validation.

evidence.sourceSpan: Required: feature engineering and monitoring of models after deployment.
evidence.statement: Required: feature engineering and monitoring of models after deployment.

evidence.sourceSpan: Translate analysis into clear recommendations for operational stakeholders.
evidence.statement: Translate analysis into clear recommendations for operational stakeholders.

evidence.sourceSpan: Preferred: experience with time-series uncertainty and production data-quality controls.
evidence.statement: Preferred: experience with time-series uncertainty and production data-quality controls.

evidence.sourceSpan: Success means measurable forecast improvement, transparent limitations, and useful business decisions.
evidence.statement: Success means measurable forecast improvement, transparent limitations, and useful business decisions.
